'''鈭歾-k-s''' ('''zakasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maime|maime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maime|maime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-k-s
|-
! Lemma
| zakasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zakasithi|zakasithi]] || [[word:zakasiji|zakasiji]] || [[word:zakasishi|zakasishi]] || [[word:zakasi|zakasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakasuthuth|zakasuthuth]] || [[word:zakasujuj|zakasujuj]] || [[word:zakasushush|zakasushush]] || [[word:zakas|zakas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakasuthu|zakasuthu]] || [[word:zakasuju|zakasuju]] || [[word:zakasushu|zakasushu]] || [[word:zakasu|zakasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakasufuth|zakasufuth]] || [[word:zakasufuj|zakasufuj]] || [[word:zakasufush|zakasufush]] || [[word:zakasuf|zakasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zakasethe|zakasethe]] || [[word:zakaseje|zakaseje]] || [[word:zakaseshe|zakaseshe]] || [[word:zakase|zakase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakasothoth|zakasothoth]] || [[word:zakasojoj|zakasojoj]] || [[word:zakasoshosh|zakasoshosh]] || [[word:zakas|zakas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakasotho|zakasotho]] || [[word:zakasojo|zakasojo]] || [[word:zakasosho|zakasosho]] || [[word:zakaso|zakaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakasofoth|zakasofoth]] || [[word:zakasofoj|zakasofoj]] || [[word:zakasofosh|zakasofosh]] || [[word:zakasof|zakasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zakas忙th忙|zakas忙th忙]] || [[word:zakas忙j忙|zakas忙j忙]] || [[word:zakas忙sh忙|zakas忙sh忙]] || [[word:zakas忙|zakas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakasathath|zakasathath]] || [[word:zakasajaj|zakasajaj]] || [[word:zakasashash|zakasashash]] || [[word:zakas|zakas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakasatha|zakasatha]] || [[word:zakasaja|zakasaja]] || [[word:zakasasha|zakasasha]] || [[word:zakasa|zakasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakasafath|zakasafath]] || [[word:zakasafaj|zakasafaj]] || [[word:zakasafash|zakasafash]] || [[word:zakasaf|zakasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zakasasha|zakasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozakasasha|gozakasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizakasasha|gokizakasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zakasn眉sha|zakasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozakasnkn眉sha|gozakasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizakasn眉sha|gokizakasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zakash毛sha|zakash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozakasnksh毛sha|gozakasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizakash毛sha|gokizakash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zakasrosha|zakasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozakasnkrosha|gozakasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizakasrosha|gokizakasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zakasmusha|zakasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakasnkmusha|gozakasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakasmusha|gokizakasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zakasherasha|zakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozakasnksherasha|gozakasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizakasherasha|gokizakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zakasngasha|zakasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozakasnkngasha|gozakasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizakasngasha|gokizakasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zakasyasha|zakasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozakasnkyasha|gozakasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizakasyasha|gokizakasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zakasyamasha|zakasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozakasnkyamasha|gozakasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizakasyamasha|gokizakasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zakasn眉sh毛sha|zakasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozakasnkn眉sh毛sha|gozakasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizakasn眉sh毛sha|gokizakasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zakasn眉rosha|zakasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozakasnkn眉rosha|gozakasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizakasn眉rosha|gokizakasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakasn眉musha|zakasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakasnkn眉musha|gozakasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakasn眉musha|gokizakasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zakash毛n眉sha|zakash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozakasnksh毛n眉sha|gozakasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizakash毛n眉sha|gokizakash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zakash毛rosha|zakash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozakasnksh毛rosha|gozakasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizakash毛rosha|gokizakash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakash毛musha|zakash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakasnksh毛musha|gozakasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakash毛musha|gokizakash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zakasron眉sha|zakasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozakasnkron眉sha|gozakasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizakasron眉sha|gokizakasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zakasrosh毛sha|zakasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozakasnkrosh毛sha|gozakasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizakasrosh毛sha|gokizakasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zakasromusha|zakasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozakasnkromusha|gozakasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizakasromusha|gokizakasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zakasmun眉sha|zakasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozakasnkmun眉sha|gozakasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizakasmun眉sha|gokizakasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zakasmush毛sha|zakasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozakasnkmush毛sha|gozakasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizakasmush毛sha|gokizakasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zakasmurosha|zakasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozakasnkmurosha|gozakasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizakasmurosha|gokizakasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zakas|zakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:z忙k忙s|z忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozakas|hozakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoz忙k忙s|hoz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozakas|hohozakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoz忙k忙s|hohoz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zakas|n眉zakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉z忙k忙s|n眉z忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zakas|n眉n眉zakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉z忙k忙s|n眉n眉z忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zakas|n茂zakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂z忙k忙s|n茂z忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zakas|n茂n茂zakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂z忙k忙s|n茂n茂z忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzakas|luzakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luz忙k忙s|luz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzakas|luluzakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluz忙k忙s|luluz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizakas|lizakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liz忙k忙s|liz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizakas|lilizakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliz忙k忙s|liliz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozakas|kozakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koz忙k忙s|koz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozakas|kokozakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoz忙k忙s|kokoz忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezakas|kezakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kez忙k忙s|kez忙k忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezakas|kekezakas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekez忙k忙s|kekez忙k忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
